name: Greater Eastern
description_short: Greater Experience Credit Union (formerly Greater Eastern) is a not-for-profit credit union chartered in 1952, offering checking, savings, loans, and mobile banking to members.
description_long: Greater Experience Credit Union was originally chartered in 1952 as a not-for-profit financial institution established to serve employees of the Mountain Home Veterans Administration Medical Center. The credit union has maintained its mission of providing quality financial products and exceptional service to its membership over seven decades. Recently, the organization rebranded from Greater Eastern Credit Union to Greater Experience Credit Union, signaling a modernization effort while maintaining its core commitment to members. GECU offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including deposit accounts, credit cards, auto loans, personal loans, home equity lines of credit (HELOC), mortgage financing, and mobile banking services. Their current promotional rates include VISA cards at 8.90% APR, auto loans as low as 4.25% APR, personal loans starting at 7.99% APR, and HELOCs at 6.75% APR. The credit union also provides remote check deposit functionality through their mobile app, digital payment options via Apple Pay and Google Pay, and SMS text banking at (423) 283-4300. What distinguishes GECU is its positioning as a community-focused credit union that emphasizes being "small enough to make a big difference." They offer specialized mortgage products including USDA 100% financing mortgages, VA mortgage programs, and first-time homebuyer options with dedicated mortgage officers. The credit union markets competitive rates across all product categories and emphasizes no annual fees and no transfer fees on VISA products, along with convenient digital banking features and financial education resources. As a credit union, GECU operates on a not-for-profit model, which theoretically benefits members through competitive rates and member-focused decision-making. However, the website provides limited detail on membership eligibility requirements beyond the original VA Medical Center employee mission, making it unclear whether the credit union has expanded its field of membership. Rates advertised are qualified by creditworthiness and restrictions, which is standard but means actual rates may vary significantly.
services: VISA credit cards with rates as low as 8.90% APR
Home Equity Lines of Credit (HELOC) starting at 6.75% APR
Mortgage loans (first-time, USDA 100%, fixed-rate, VA programs)
Remote mobile check deposit via GECU mobile app
Digital payments through Apple Pay and Google Pay
SMS text banking and account management
Financial education resources on budgeting, credit reports, and identity theft protection
Mortgage officer assistance throughout loan process
pros: Low auto loan rates starting at 4.25% APR with competitive financing
No annual fees and no transfer fees on VISA credit cards
Remote mobile check deposit available through GECU mobile app
Digital payment integration with Apple Pay and Google Pay on debit cards
Specialized mortgage programs including VA, USDA, and first-time homebuyer options
SMS text banking available for account access and customer service
Not-for-profit credit union structure designed to benefit members
Comprehensive financial education resource library covering budgeting, identity theft, credit reports, and homeownership
cons: Membership eligibility requirements not clearly stated on website; unclear if field of membership has expanded beyond original VA Medical Center employee base
All advertised rates qualified by creditworthiness and unspecified restrictions, suggesting actual rates may be significantly higher
Limited transparency on fees for services beyond VISA card products; HELOC and mortgage fees not disclosed
No information provided about account minimum balance requirements or monthly service fees for checking/savings accounts
best_for: Current and former VA Medical Center employees seeking competitive rates and member-focused service
Borrowers with good to excellent credit seeking low auto loan and mortgage rates
Tech-savvy banking customers who want mobile check deposit and digital payment integration
First-time homebuyers and VA loan-eligible borrowers looking for specialized mortgage programs
diagnosis: GECU is best suited for individuals with established eligibility (likely VA Medical Center employees or families) or those with good credit seeking competitive loan rates in a not-for-profit credit union environment. The main caveat is that membership eligibility criteria are not clearly disclosed online, so potential members should contact the credit union directly to confirm they qualify, and advertised rates are heavily qualified by creditworthiness, meaning actual rates depend on individual credit profiles.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
